title: v1.0.65 Update
description: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.0.65! This stable architecture release introduces smart algorithmic updates, strict edge-case data corrections, and critical structural fixes to our native document engines.
features:
🧩 Smart Algorithmic Topic Merging
Unified Master Topic Cards: The underlying sorting engine has been re-architected to dynamically parse and merge cross-sectional elements.

Section-Agnostic Aggregation: The system now correctly groups questions belonging to different exam parts (e.g., Section A vs. Section B) into the same centralized master topic view, keeping your custom databases unified.

💪 Workout Mode Refinements
Intelligent Field Constraints: The question source filter now automatically locks out and hides unsupported external databases when navigating a CSEB course view, preventing user data-entry errors.

Adaptive Dropdowns: Database routing hooks have been rewritten to deliver a significantly smoother and cleaner subtopic checklist population during course manual configurations.

🔍 Embedded Report Analyzer Fixes
Strict Colon-Agnostic PDF Ingestion: Upgraded the parsing pipeline inside the Analytics report engine. The processor now completely tolerates formatting text anomalies, entirely preventing application crashes caused by missing colon identifiers in uploaded reports.

📄 Massively Upgraded PDF Document Exports
Richer Metrics Array: Lifetime Study Reports now feature a comprehensive dashboard export that securely prints session volume logs, streak timelines, mock accuracy tracking, and card workout completion scores directly into a clean single-page format.

Richer Monthly Breakdown: The Monthly PDF engine now contextually maps granular per-subject hour charts alongside classic calendar grid presence sheets.

Weekly Attendance Progress Matrix: Attendance PDF printouts now bundle a new structural weekly breakdown grid that reflects total study hours locked specifically on present calendar days.

Weekly Hour Target Calculations: The progression percentage formula inside the Study PDF export has been heavily corrected. It now computes strictly against your current weekly target settings instead of duplicating life-to-date values.

⚡ Aggressive Caching & Logic Tuning
O(1) Memory Cache Hit Checking: Implemented a global memory layout state tracker (appCache.analytics). The application safely bypasses expensive analytical loops during component paint updates by tracking structural state mutations via discrete hashes.

Flawless Timezone Calibration: Restructured calendar baseline computations to lock synchronization strictly to the local timezone, ensuring weekly performance panels and charts group intervals seamlessly from Sunday to Saturday.
